action.reasoning: Observation: Residual GCN (hidden=512, 6 layers, dropout=0.1) reached mae_60min=4.0229 (best so far), val MAE=2.999 after 40 epochs with train loss still declining to 0.2405 and no overfitting (consistent with curve). Analysis: Model works well but can benefit from more capacity (extra layers), regularization (higher dropout, weight decay via AdamW), and longer training (80 epochs) given slow but steady improvement and ~40s/epoch timing (fits remaining ~2h budget). Incremental hyperparam changes are low-risk vs. full arch rewrite. Decision: Update model defaults + train.py for AdamW/wd=1e-5, dropout=0.15, num_gcn_layers=8, epochs=80, patience=10; retrain and submit_eval to push mae_60min lower.
